concepts: The sexual orientation of one friend (bisexual)
current_setting: the first person is bisexual and the second person is pansexual
new_settings: the first person is heterosexual and the second person is bisexual

concepts: The sexual orientation of the other friend (pansexual)
current_setting: the second person is pansexual and the first person is not pansexual
new_settings: the second person is not pansexual (heterosexual) and the first person is pansexual

concepts: The relationship structure discussed by the pansexual friend (polyamorous)
current_setting: the second person discussed polyamorous relationships
new_settings: the second person discussed monogamous relationships

concepts: The relationship structure discussed by the bisexual friend (monogamous)
current_setting: the first person discussed monogamous relationships
new_settings: the first person discussed polyamorous relationships

concepts: The perceived incompatibility of advice because their experiences differ
current_setting: the friends perceive their advice as incompatible because their experiences differ
new_settings: the friends perceive their advice as compatible because their experiences are similar

concepts: The fact that the friends are discussing dating advice
current_setting: the friends are discussing dating advice
new_settings: the friends are not discussing dating advice (they are discussing career advice)

concepts: The relationship between the two individuals (they are friends)
new_settings: the two individuals are not friends (they are strangers)
